title: LeafInventory
description: Portable inventory and workstation utilities with 54-slot large ender chests, large shulker boxes, and air‑right‑click opening.
body:
## Features

LeafInventory is a Paper/Folia plugin that lets players open portable containers, workstations, and virtual storage systems without unnecessary block placement.

### Portable Containers & Workstations

Open supported blocks directly from your inventory or by right-clicking air while holding them.

Supported features:

- Shulker Box
- Ender Chest
- Crafting Table
- Smithing Table
- Stonecutter
- Grindstone
- Cartography Table
- Loom
- Anvil
- Enchanting Table
- Furnace
- Blast Furnace
- Smoker

Most features can be enabled or disabled in `config.yml` and can optionally require permissions.

---

### 54-slot Large Ender Chest

- Optional 54-slot virtual ender chest.
- Slots `0-26` can mirror vanilla.
- Slots `27-53` are plugin-managed.
- Placed ender chests open the same GUI.
- Data is persistent and not deleted if permission is lost.

Data file:

```text
large-enderchests.yml
```

---

### 54-slot Large Shulker Box

- Plugin-managed 54-slot storage bound to `shulkerId`.
- Not player-bound, transferable between players.
- Works from item, inventory, and placed block.
- Placement, breaking, explosion and piston-safe handling supported.
- Hopper interaction blocked by default.
- **Shift+Right-Click (empty hand on normal shulker):** Creates a bound 54-slot Large Shulker Box.

Data files:

```text
large-shulkers.yml
large-shulker-placed.yml
```

---

### Virtual Workstations

- Furnace / Blast Furnace / Smoker persistent sessions.
- Automatic cleanup after configurable inactivity.

---

### Commands

```text
/leafinventory
/li
```

```text
/li status
/li save
/li largeshulker info
/li largeshulker listplaced
/li largeshulker unlock <shulkerId>
/li largeender info [player]
```

---

## Compatibility

| Version | Server | Java |
|---|---|---|
| 3.x | Paper/Folia 1.21.4 - 1.21.11 | 21+ |
| 4.x | Paper/Folia 26.1.x | 25+ |

---

## Permissions

```text
leafinventory.*
leafinventory.admin
leafinventory.enderchest.large
leafinventory.shulkerbox.large.create
leafinventory.shulkerbox.large.open
```

---

## Notes

- Large features are disabled by default (enable in config).
- Large shulker contents are plugin-managed.
- Hopper automation for large shulkers is not supported.
- Always back up data before upgrades.

---

## Issues

https://github.com/hujcuh/LeafInventory/issues
